usage:
  quill check [flags]

run STYLE.md checks

flags:
    -format string
        format: text|json (default "text")
    -mode string
        mode: required|all (default "required")
    -repo-root string
        repository root (auto-detected when omitted)
    -scope string
        configured scope (profile default when omitted)
    -strict-recommendations
        fail on recommendation findings
    -verbose
        print failing output
